product_name: So Slime DIY Slime Case Shaker Storage Set

bullets: This slime kit makes it fun and easy to create custom slime without a mess
Combine slime colors, confetti, glitter and surprise figurines for the coolest slime around
Simply pour one slime powder pack, glitter and water into the shaker cup…then shake
You can mix and combine slime colors to create your own style
Store everything in the reuseable container
content.description: Make your own shimmery slime with a surprise! All the supplies come in this cool storeage case. This slime kit makes it fun and easy to create custom slime without a mess.  Combine slime colors, confetti, glitter and surprise figurines for the coolest slime around. Includes everything you need…just add water! No glue required. Simply pour one slime powder pack, glitter and water into the shaker cup…then shake! You can mix and combine slime colors to create your own style! Add one of the surprise figurine into the slime. Which 3 surprises figures will you get?! Styles and colors will vary. Includes 1 storage case. 6 Slime Powder Packs, 2 Glitter Pack, 3 Confetti Packs, 3 Shaker Containers, 3 Surprise Figures, 1 stir stick, 1 sticker sheet and Instructions. Ages 6+. Made In China. Notice: Colors and styles of contents may vary. Conforms to ASTM D-4236. Do not put content near eyes or mouth. Do not eat or ingest contents. Wash hands after use. Contents contain colorants that may stain certain surfaces. Read all instructions before use.

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 storage case. 6 Slime Powder Packs, 2 Glitter Pack, 3 Confetti Packs, 3 Shaker Containers, 3 Surprise Figures, 1 stir stick, 1 sticker sheet and Instructions
